subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration.

I'd be glad to set up an introductory call. Would any of the following time windows work for you?

- 21 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00 (your local time)
- 22 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00
- 23 April 2026, between 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot you prefer, or suggest an alternative if none of these are convenient.

Regarding internal contact information, I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact details, but I'm happy to coordinate any next steps and ensure the right stakeholders are involved on our side.

Best regards,
Agent
